Guests

Be a guest on The Healthy Project Podcast

Have a story, idea, or body of work that can help people better understand health and community? We'd love to hear from you.

Submit a Guest Inquiry

The Healthy Project Podcast features conversations with people working across public health, healthcare, community advocacy, research, policy, storytelling, and lived experience.

We look for guests who can bring insight, clarity, honesty, and practical value to conversations about health.

Pitch

Tell us about you (or your guest)

The more context you give, the better. Pitches don't need to be polished.

The Healthy Project Podcast

A documentary-style audio archive of how communities confront structural health inequities.

Hosted by Corey Dion Lewis
